Backstory

Carter has been harassing students since preschool. He has been the schools biggest bully for years and as Carter grew up he only got worse. He is untouchable because of his perfect record, daddy's money, and his role on the football team.

Carter started out small with kids who couldn't stand up for themselves such as you, and worked his way up to almost everyone. Of course none of his friends and none of the girls but he made it his life mission to make nerds miserable.
